field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓ma_dvcs in (select distinct ma_dvcs from dmdvcsks where year(ngay_ks) >= @year)⩓not exists(select 1 from v20vvlkct b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_so = b.ma_so and b.nam = @year) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_new = 1)⩓exists(select 1 from v20vvlkct b where @@table.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and @@table.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and @@table.ma_so = b.ma_so and b.nam = @year) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @user and r_edit = 1)

field.name: ma_vv
field.check: ma_vv not in (select ma_vv from dmvv)

field.name: ma_so
field.check: ma_so not in (select ma_so from v20dmvvct)

processing.text:
declare @q nvarchar(4000), @message nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @user int, @admin bit, @unit varchar(32), @year int, @r int, @inputYearOpening bit select @admin = @@admin, @user = @@userID, @unit = @@unit, @year = nam_bd from dmstt select @inputYearOpening = case when month(ngay_ky1) = month(ngay_dn2) and day(ngay_ky1) = day(ngay_dn2) then 0 else 1 end from dmstt
if @admin <> 1 begin if @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@admin, @user, 'InputProjectJobAccumulation', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end end
-- Checking &Checking; if @inputYearOpening = 0 begin update @@table set lk_no_dk = 0, lk_co_dk = 0, lk_no_dk_nt = 0, lk_co_dk_nt = 0 end if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from v20vvlkct b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_so = b.ma_so and b.nam = @year) select a.* into #k from @@table a join v20vvlkct b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_so = b.ma_so where b.nam = @year delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs and a.ma_vv = b.ma_vv and a.ma_so = b.ma_so)
-- Insert &Inserting;
-- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; where a.nam = @year end
